description: You stand in a cracked asphalt lot outside a dusty Valero gas station. The neon sign flickers weakly in the relentless desert heat.
dayDesc: You stand in a cracked asphalt lot outside a dusty Valero gas station. The neon sign is barely visible against the blazing midday sun.
nightDesc: You stand in a cracked asphalt lot outside a dusty Valero gas station. The neon sign casts a pale glow across the dark pavement, buzzing softly.

exits.description: A sun-bleached road stretches east into the flat desert.
A cracked asphalt lot extends to the south.

description: A long, sun-bleached road stretches in both directions through the flat desert. Heat shimmers rise from the asphalt in lazy waves.
dayDesc: A long, sun-bleached road stretches in both directions through the flat desert. Heat shimmers rise from the asphalt in lazy waves.
nightDesc: A long road stretches in both directions through the dark desert. Stars blaze overhead and the cooling asphalt ticks quietly.

exits.description: The flickering neon of a Valero station is visible to the west.
A weathered crossroads lies to the east.
A parched field of hard-packed earth opens to the south.

description: A weathered stop sign marks this crossing of two crumbling roads. Tire tracks in the dust suggest it was busier once.

exits.description: The desert road continues west.
A rusted guardrail lines the road to the east.
A dry creek bed is visible to the south.

description: A rusted guardrail lines the road's edge here, bent and flaking. Beyond it, the desert drops away into a shallow arroyo.

exits.description: The crossroads lies back to the west.
Dense dark brush crowds the path to the south.

description: An old parking lot, its surface cracked and heaved by decades of summer heat. Scraggly weeds push up through every fissure.

exits.description: The Valero station stands to the north.
A parched field stretches to the east.
The ruins of another gas station lie to the south.

description: Dry, hard-packed earth stretches in all directions. A few brittle stalks of grass rattle in the hot wind.

exits.description: A desert road runs to the north.
A cracked lot lies to the west.
A dry creek bed winds to the east.
A rocky hill rises to the south.

description: A shallow creek bed winds through the desert here, bone dry and choked with pale gravel. It hasn't seen water in years.

exits.description: The crossroads is to the north.
A parched field lies to the west.
Dark brush thickens to the east.
A mesquite grove stands to the south.

description: A dense thicket of dark scrub brush crowds the path. Thorns catch at your clothes, and something unseen rustles in the shadows.

exits.description: The guardrail is visible to the north.
A dry creek bed lies to the west.
Sandstone boulders jut from the ground to the south.

description: The skeletal remains of an old gas station lean in the heat. The pumps are long gone; only their concrete islands remain, stained and crumbling.

exits.description: The cracked lot stretches to the north.
A low hill rises to the east.
A flat expanse of pale clay lies to the south.

shortDescription: A Hill with a Desert Moose
description: A low rocky hill rises here, and at its crest stands a large moose, utterly unbothered by the desert surroundings, chewing something dry.

exits.description: A parched field opens to the north.
An abandoned gas station lies to the west.
A mesquite grove stands to the east.
The air shimmers with a persistent mirage to the south.

description: Gnarled mesquite trees cast thin, inadequate shade. Their roots snake across the surface of the ground, searching for any hidden moisture.

exits.description: A dry creek bed lies to the north.
A hill with a moose is to the west.
Rocky outcroppings rise to the east.
A towering saguaro stands to the south.

description: Large sandstone boulders jut from the desert floor here, warm to the touch and worn smooth by wind-driven sand over countless years.

exits.description: Dark brush thickens to the north.
A mesquite grove lies to the west.
A rise with a mountain view lies to the south.

description: An expanse of pale, cracked clay stretches to the south, its surface patterned like the scales of some enormous sleeping beast.

exits.description: The abandoned gas station is to the north.
Shimmering air dances to the east.

description: The air here shimmers with a persistent mirage — a glittering lake that retreats endlessly as you approach. The horizon seems to breathe.

exits.description: A hill rises to the north.
Pale cracked clay stretches to the west.
A lone saguaro stands to the east.

description: A single enormous saguaro cactus stands here, its arms raised to the burning sky. Decades of growth captured in weathered green flesh.

exits.description: A mesquite grove lies to the north.
Shimmering mirage air dances to the west.
A rise with distant mountains is to the east.

description: From this slight rise, the jagged silhouette of distant mountains cuts the horizon. They look close but the desert between is merciless.

exits.description: Rocky outcroppings lie to the north.
A lone saguaro stands to the west.
